title: AWS Access Key Detected
remediation: Remove the hardcoded key and use environment variables or AWS IAM roles

title: GitHub Personal Access Token
remediation: Revoke at GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens

title: Slack Webhook URL
remediation: Store webhook URLs in repository secrets, not in code

title: High Entropy String
detail: Possible API key or token (Shannon entropy: 4.8)
remediation: If this is a secret, move it to environment variables
